page_content:
FREN799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)

FREN818 French Literary Criticism (3 Credits) Analysis and evaluation of various trends in literary criticism. Topic to be determined each semester.

FREN499 Special Topics in French Studies (3 Credits) An aspect of French studies, the speciﬁc topic to be announced each time the course is offered. Prerequisite: FREN387; or permission of ARHU-French & Italian Languages & Literatures department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
